final:
module dram_cell (
    input clk,
    input we,
    input [3:0] data_in,
    output reg [3:0] data_out
);
    reg [3:0] cache;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (we) begin
            cache <= data_in; // Write data to cache
        end
        else begin
            data_out <= cache; // Read data from cache
        end
    end
endmodule
